metadata.title: Global Agentic OS Dashboard
metadata.sourcePolicy: Local folder mode only. No GitHub status was used. Status pulled from local task files on 2026-05-31.

summary.overallStatus: Both iOS apps are in the final pre-submission gate. RunSmart iOS is submit-ready (build 6 uploaded); portal close-out is the only remaining task. Resumely iOS is pre-submission with PostHog integration as the last technical gate.
summary.bestNextAction: RunSmart iOS: open App Store Connect portal, select build 6, upload screenshots, enter demo credentials, submit for review. Resumely iOS: integrate PostHog SDK (app_launched + optimize_completed, 2-day cap), then submit.
mainBlockers: RunSmart iOS: App Store Connect portal tasks are human-only (no agent action available).
Resumely iOS: PostHog SDK not integrated — zero analytics visibility post-launch.
Resumely iOS: no local Fastlane config / ASC API key — screenshot upload requires manual setup.
Resumely iOS: Resume Library backend (/api/v1/resumes) not live; mock service active.
needsDecision: EXD-002: analytics instrumentation scope and cap (recommendation: 2-day cap, activation + export-success only).
Resumely iOS: Fastlane / ASC credentials setup (founder action required).

projects.name: RunSmart iOS
projects.role: Primary premium mobile running coach product.
projects.status: Submit-ready. Build 6 uploaded to App Store Connect. GPS/battery QA passed twice (2026-05-27 and 2026-05-30). Portal close-out is the only remaining gate.
projects.distributionStatus: Build 6 uploaded; ASO screenshots generated; portal close-out in progress
projects.currentPhase: App Store submission sprint — portal close-out
projects.activeStory: App Store Connect portal close-out (human-only): select build 6, upload screenshots, enter demo credentials, submit for review
projects.lastCompletedStory: GPS/battery QA ×2; Garmin freshness fix Stories 1+2; E7 Wearable Depth; Flex Week Analytics Stories 8+9
projects.nextRecommendedStory: Human: select build 6 in ASC, upload 6.9" + 6.1" screenshots, confirm privacy / age rating, submit
projects.lastValidation: GPS QA run 2: 9.10 km 2026-05-30 PASS (1,432 GPS pts, 7% battery drain). Focused tests all green: StriverPersonaGateTests 3/3, WellnessTrendMapperTests 4/4, FlexWeekCacheTests 4/4.
projects.validationState: All QA passed. Portal tasks are human-only.
blockers: App Store Connect portal tasks are human-only: select build, upload screenshots, enter demo credentials, confirm privacy questionnaire and age rating.
Garmin freshness Story 4 (webhook audit) is backend/human investigation.
risks: Garmin webhook subscription health not yet audited

analyticsStatus.note: Activation funnel not yet fully visible. run_started and run_completed are the highest-value missing events.

nextActions: Human: open App Store Connect, select processed build 6.
Human: upload 6.9" and 6.1" screenshots from build/AppStoreExportClean.
Human: enter demo credentials, confirm privacy questionnaire (4+), category (Health & Fitness), submit for review.

projects.name: Resumely iOS
projects.role: Native iOS app for Resumely resume optimization product.
projects.status: Pre-submission. Live optimize/design/expert/preview flow stable. Screenshots rendered (rb-aso-002). PostHog NOT integrated — last technical gate before submission.
projects.currentPhase: Pre-submission sprint — PostHog integration + ASC upload
projects.activeStory: Integrate PostHog SDK (app_launched + optimize_completed); upload screenshots to App Store Connect
projects.lastCompletedStory: rb-aso-002 screenshots rendered; 55/55 tests passing; live expert flow stable; backend expert contracts 24/24
projects.nextRecommendedStory: Integrate PostHog SDK (2-day cap); set up Fastlane ASC API key; submit for review
projects.validationState: Build and tests passing. Real-device smoke test with live account not done.
blockers: PostHog SDK not integrated — no analytics events fire.
No local Fastlane config / ASC API key — App Store Connect upload requires manual setup.
Resume Library backend (/api/v1/resumes) not live; mock service active.
Real-device smoke test with live account not completed.
risks: WKWebView PDF render fragility on real device
Backend Resume Library not yet live

analyticsStatus.note: PostHog SDK not present in codebase. No analytics events fire. Full activation funnel blind.

nextActions: Integrate PostHog SDK via SPM; create minimal AnalyticsService; wire app_launched + optimize_completed.
Set up Fastlane / ASC API key (founder action) to enable screenshot + metadata upload.
Submit Resumely for App Store review.

projects.name: RunSmart Web
projects.role: Main AI running coach product and source of product logic.
projects.status: Portfolio reference project. No current execution status pulled on 2026-05-31.
projects.nextRecommendedStory: Refresh local repo status before making implementation decisions.
projects.validationState: Needs local status refresh before execution.

nextActions: Read RunSmart Web local Agent OS before any implementation.
Use as product logic reference for RunSmart iOS only after repo evidence is checked.

projects.name: ResumeBuilder AI (Web)
projects.role: High-quality resume generation, templates, export, confidence, and conversion.

projects.nextRecommendedStory: Confirm local repo path and refresh status before execution.

blockers: Local repo path not confirmed in PROJECT-PATHS.md.

projects.name: Atlas
projects.role: Cross-project coordination for tasks, context, specs, QA, workflows, and agents.
projects.status: Future orchestration concept. Do not build before the workflow is proven manually.
projects.nextRecommendedStory: Keep manual workflow lightweight; automate only after repeated patterns are proven.
projects.lastValidation: Concept only; no repo path confirmed.
projects.validationState: Concept only; no repo path confirmed.
blockers: Manual orchestration workflow not yet proven enough to automate.
risks: Replacing local project truth with stale global summaries
nextActions: Use the Global Agentic OS dashboard as a manual coordination layer.
Keep local project repos as source of truth.
Record repeatable workflows before building Atlas automation.

now: RunSmart iOS: App Store Connect portal close-out (human) — select build 6, upload screenshots, enter demo credentials, submit.
Resumely iOS: integrate PostHog SDK (2-day cap: app_launched + optimize_completed).
Resumely iOS: set up Fastlane / ASC API key for screenshot upload.
next: Resumely iOS: submit to App Store Connect.
Both apps: post-launch activation monitoring once live.
RunSmart iOS: wire run_started + run_completed events (post-submission).
later: RunSmart iOS: analytics for plan_created, onboarding_completed.
Resumely iOS: backend Resume Library integration, PDF/export device QA, Hebrew/RTL.
Both: CFO OS — revenue, cost, and gross margin instrumentation.
blocked: Resumely iOS ASC upload until Fastlane / ASC credentials are configured.
Resumely iOS real Resume Library integration until /api/v1/resumes ships.

qaBoard.buildStatus: Simulator build clean; all focused tests green.
qaBoard.appStoreReadiness: Portal close-out remaining (human-only). No agent gate open.
qaBoard.missingValidation: ASC portal close-out (human): select build, upload screenshots, enter credentials, submit.

qaBoard.manualQAStatus: Real-device smoke test with live account not done.
qaBoard.appStoreReadiness: Not ready — PostHog not integrated; no ASC credentials locally.
qaBoard.missingValidation: PostHog integration, ASC credentials / Fastlane setup, real-device smoke test.

top3: RunSmart iOS: App Store Connect portal close-out (human) — select build 6, upload screenshots, submit.
Resumely iOS: integrate PostHog (2-day cap), then submit.
Analytics instrumentation (EXD-002): define scope for both apps before any new feature work.
openDecisions: EXD-002: analytics instrumentation scope (recommendation: 2-day cap, activation events only)
executiveBoard.financialSnapshot: Needs Data — no revenue/cost instrumentation wired.
executiveBoard.note: See executive-os/EXECUTIVE-DASHBOARD.md for the full Executive Intelligence OS view.

decisionBoard.whyItMatters: Shipping both apps with zero funnel visibility means post-launch decisions will be blind.
decisionBoard.options: Instrument first (2-day cap) / ship features first / do both simultaneously
decisionBoard.recommendedOption: Instrument first, cap at 2 days, scope to activation + export-success only. RunSmart: run_started + run_completed. Resumely: app_launched + optimize_completed.

decisionBoard.decision: Resumely iOS: PostHog before or after first submission?
decisionBoard.whyItMatters: Data from day 1 is worth more than data from week 2. 2-day integration cost is low.
decisionBoard.options: Integrate before submit / submit now and wire post-launch

decisionBoard.whyItMatters: Screenshots cannot be uploaded without credentials; manual ASC web upload is time-consuming.
decisionBoard.options: Fastlane with ASC API key / manual upload in ASC web UI
decisionBoard.recommendedOption: Set up Fastlane with ASC API key (founder action).
